title: Unexpected Right Join Result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 TIMESTAMP, c1 FLOAT CHECK (c1 >= 0));
SELECT * FROM t2 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT c0 FROM t3 WHERE c1 < 2) AS sub ON t2.c0 = sub.c0;
key_bug_features: RIGHT JOIN with unexpected execution result
